meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve can't finish projects (Intermediate Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't finish projects. A Intermediate-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Project Template Checklist
content.seo_description: Stop stalling on SaaS builds. Use our Antigravity project template and Claude Code to ship faster, impress clients, and finish every project on time.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template eliminates 'analysis paralysis' by providing a pre-configured, production-ready scaffold for AI apps. By integrating this with Claude Code, you automate boilerplate setup and architectural decisions, allowing you to focus exclusively on core business logic and client-specific requirements, ensuring you ship consistently and profitably.
content.intro:
You know the feeling: the initial spark of a new project dies the moment you stare at a blank directory. The fear of wrong architectural choices, complex dependency management, and the looming mountain of boilerplate code kills your momentum before the first line of code is written. Your freelance career isn't stalling because you lack talent; it's stalling because you lack a repeatable, high-velocity engine.

Enter the Antigravity project template. This isn't just a boilerplate; it's a battle-tested foundation designed for the modern AI builder. By marrying this architecture with the raw power of Claude Code, you transform from a struggling developer into a production-grade machine, capable of shipping polished, client-ready SaaS products in record time.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the base architecture to avoid 'empty directory' syndrome. This ensures your project starts with secure auth, database connectivity, and modular routing.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Scaffold a new SaaS project using the Antigravity enterprise template with Next.js, Supabase, and Tailwind CSS configured for rapid deployment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Initialize project using Antigravity scaffold'

steps.title: Define Core Domain Logic
steps.description: Shift focus from infrastructure to business value. We use Claude Code to map out the specific features the client is paying for.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the project requirements and generate the database schema and API endpoints for user-specific data management.

steps.title: Automate Boilerplate Generation
steps.description: Stop writing repetitive CRUD operations. Let the AI handle the tedious data-layer plumbing while you oversee the architectural integrity.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate CRUD operations for the defined schema, including validation logic and error handling using Zod.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --prompt 'Generate CRUD modules based on schema'

steps.title: Inject AI Agent Intelligence
steps.description: Integrate your AI features directly into the template. This makes the app feel 'alive' and provides the high-value functionality clients love.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement an AI-driven service layer that connects to the LLM API, ensuring streaming responses and conversation history persistence.

steps.title: Final QA and Production Polish
steps.description: Perform a rigorous sweep to ensure the code is production-ready. We focus on performance metrics and security headers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the entire codebase for security vulnerabilities and performance bottlenecks, then suggest optimization patches.

pro_tips: Always keep a 'git clean' state before running Claude Code to ensure you can revert specific AI-generated changes easily.
Use custom system prompts in Claude Code to force it to use your specific project coding style and naming conventions.
Treat your Antigravity template like a product; update it every time you finish a client project to include new lessons learned.
Run Claude Code in 'interactive' mode for critical architectural decisions to maintain human oversight on core logic.
Pre-configure your environment variables in a .env.example file to ensure the Antigravity scaffold connects to services instantly.
content.next_steps: Once the boilerplate is live, deploy to Vercel and set up your CI/CD pipeline to ensure every push triggers an automated build check.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting projects die in the draft phase. Leverage the right architecture to turn your freelance business into a high-output development studio. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
